title: pogostemon litigiosus
intro: Pogostemon litigiosus, also known as Patchouli, is a perennial herb native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pogostemon litigiosus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress, and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of Pogostemon litigiosus include essential oils, teas, and infusions that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
